forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: d880
+title: 'Remove or gate 4 #[ignore]''d llama-embedding model tests that require a local GGUF'
+---
+What: llama-embedding/src/model.rs has 4 tests marked `#[ignore = "requires GGUF model downloaded locally"]` at lines 655, 692, 708, 733. Skipped-forever tests violate the test discipline.
+
+Acceptance Criteria:
+- Convert these into feature-gated tests (e.g. `#[cfg(feature = "local-gguf-tests")]`) OR move them to a `tests/local/` integration test that is invoked by an opt-in CI matrix step, OR delete them if the coverage is redundant with existing mock-based tests.
+- Goal: `cargo nextest run -p llama-embedding --run-ignored all` reports zero ignored tests in the default configuration.
+
+Tests: The replacement/gate must be stable (no hidden ignores). Verify with `cargo nextest list -p llama-embedding` — no tests appear as "(ignored)".
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value:
What: llama-embedding/src/model.rs has 4 tests marked `#[ignore = "requires GGUF model downloaded locally"]` at lines 655, 692, 708, 733. Skipped-forever tests violate the test discipline.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Convert these into feature-gated tests (e.g. `#[cfg(feature = "local-gguf-tests")]`) OR move them to a `tests/local/` integration test that is invoked by an opt-in CI matrix step, OR delete them if the coverage is redundant with existing mock-based tests.
- Goal: `cargo nextest run -p llama-embedding --run-ignored all` reports zero ignored tests in the default configuration.

Tests: The replacement/gate must be stable (no hidden ignores). Verify with `cargo nextest list -p llama-embedding` — no tests appear as "(ignored)".
Remove or gate 4 #[ignore]'d llama-embedding model tests that require a local GGUF
